name: Webull
description_short: Commission-free trading platform with extended hours, paper trading, and advanced charting for retail traders.
description_long:
Webull has quickly become one of the most popular commission-free trading platforms, particularly among younger traders who appreciate its modern interface and mobile-first design. The platform offers commission-free trading for US stocks, ETFs, options, and crypto, with extended hours trading from 4AM to 8PM ET.

Unlike some commission-free competitors, Webull provides genuinely useful charting tools with 50+ technical indicators, 19 drawing tools, and automated chart pattern detection. The desktop application offers a more traditional trading terminal experience, while the mobile app is one of the best in the industry.

Webull's built-in paper trading lets new traders practice with virtual money using real market data. The platform also offers IPO access, OTC trading, and fractional shares, making it a comprehensive choice for retail traders who want professional features without paying commissions.
pros: Commission-free across stocks, options, and crypto
Built-in paper trading with real data
Strong charting tools for a free platform
cons: Revenue from payment for order flow may impact execution quality
